title: Basecamp Project
description: Represents a Basecamp project (bucket), which is the top-level container for all collaboration content including messages, to-dos, documents, schedules, campfires, and card tables. Projects are owned by an account and can be accessed by invited team members and clients.

id.description: Unique identifier for the project within the Basecamp account

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the project

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the project was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the project was last updated

description.description: Optional description providing context about the project's purpose or scope

purpose.description: Project purpose classification such as 'team_project' or 'company_hq'

clients_enabled.description: Whether client visibility is enabled for this project, allowing invited client users to view designated content

timesheet_enabled.description: Whether timesheet tracking is enabled for this project

color.description: Optional color identifier used to visually distinguish the project in the Basecamp interface

url.description: Canonical API URL for this project resource

app_url.description: Web URL to open this project in the Basecamp application

bookmark_url.description: API URL to bookmark this project for the authenticated user

dock.description: List of tools available on this project's dock, each representing an enabled feature such as messages, to-dos, schedule, or campfire

DockItem.description: A tool or feature available on a Basecamp project dock

id.description: Unique identifier for this dock item resource

title.description: Display title of the tool shown to users (e.g., 'Message Board', 'To-dos')

name.description: Internal machine-readable name of the tool

enabled.description: Whether this tool is currently enabled and visible on the project

position.description: Display order position of this tool in the project dock

url.description: API URL for this tool's resource within the project

app_url.description: Web URL to open this tool within the project in the Basecamp application
